fields.description: Mark this persona as the default for new chat sessions.
fields.label: Default Persona

fields.description: Icon name or emoji for the persona badge in the chat sidebar.
fields.label: Icon

fields.description: Color for the persona badge in the chat sidebar (hex format).
fields.label: Color

fields.description: System prompt that defines this persona's behavior. Inherited by all sessions created under this persona.
fields.label: System Prompt

fields.description: Default LLM provider for sessions under this persona. If empty, the system default provider is used.
fields.label: Default LLM Provider

fields.description: Default temperature for sessions under this persona (0–1.5). Leave empty to use provider default.
fields.label: Temperature

fields.description: Enable thinking/reasoning mode for sessions under this persona.
fields.label: Enable Thinking Mode

fields.description: Enable streaming responses for sessions under this persona.
fields.label: Enable Streaming

fields.description: Automatically generate follow-up question suggestions after each agent response.
fields.label: Enable Follow-up Suggestions

fields.description: When enabled, no tools will be available in this persona's sessions. Overrides all Tool Group settings.
fields.label: Disable All Tools

fields.description: Restrict this persona to specific tool groups. Leave empty to allow all tools.
fields.label: Tool Groups

fields.description: Use a lightweight LLM call each turn to select only the relevant tools from the configured groups, reducing token overhead further.
fields.label: Enable Per-Turn Tool Routing

fields.description: Learned user preferences for this persona, stored as JSON. Populated automatically by the UserPreferenceProvider.
fields.label: Preferences
